handoffBrief.summary: DOC-2847 pipeline run integrated 12 new knowledge entries (2 patterns, 2 anti-patterns, 4 domain insights, 4 source observations) and updated 5 existing entries (2 promoted to high, 1 promoted to medium, 1 demoted, 1 reference-updated). Two hyper-specific signals were discarded for failing the reusability quality gate. The knowledge base grew from 40 to 52 entries.
